measurement_method: Measure available flat landing footprint at the large-pair station; record any corner/edge relief needed
release_rule: Release square pad unless station photo proves a specific trim.

measurement_method: Measure old stack if available and dry-stack washer/cup/sleeve hardware
release_rule: Release 24 mm free height unless dry-stack proves a different installed compression is needed.

measurement_method: Measure final crush sleeve OD after sleeve route is known
release_rule: Do not drill/punch rubber until sleeve OD is known.

measurement_method: Measure available flat landing footprint at each small station; record any corner/edge relief needed
release_rule: Release square pad unless station photo proves a specific trim.

measurement_method: Measure old stack if available and dry-stack washer/cup/sleeve hardware
release_rule: Release 22 mm free height unless dry-stack proves a different installed compression is needed.

measurement_method: Measure final crush sleeve OD after sleeve route is known
release_rule: Do not drill/punch rubber until sleeve OD is known.

measurement_method: If the old small mount separates into a seat and spacer, measure seat thickness at four points
release_rule: Use Energy 4146 only as a cross-check, not as a direct rubber release dimension.

measurement_method: Look for two short station rubbers in removed samples; measure if present
release_rule: Do not add to production count unless matched to a real vehicle position.

measurement_method: Measure bolt shank and old sleeve ID
release_rule: Sleeve ID must clear the final bolt without excessive slop.

measurement_method: Measure old sleeve OD and rubber bore/cup register
release_rule: Sleeve OD cannot be inferred safely from photos.

measurement_method: Assemble sample stack with cup/seat and measure intended compression
release_rule: Release sleeve length only after rubber/seat stack is final.

measurement_method: Measure old cup or seat washer OD, hole ID, dish depth, thickness, flatness, rust thinning, and cracks
release_rule: Reuse if serviceable; recreate separately as steel hardware only if needed.

measurement_method: Dry-stack cup/washer, square pad, and sleeve to confirm full support without rocking
release_rule: Washer/cup hardware controls stack crush but does not prove a round rubber outside shape.

measurement_method: Measure old reusable cups away from rust-thinned edges
release_rule: Replace if thinned, cracked, or distorted.

measurement_method: Measure long axis after laying part flat without stretching
release_rule: Release only from physical sample because photo is off-plane.

measurement_method: Measure widest undamaged section
release_rule: Release only from physical sample because edges are damaged.

measurement_method: Measure at four points away from cracks and raised inserts
release_rule: Use maximum undamaged height as the free-height target.

measurement_method: Measure centre-to-centre using hole edges or insert bores
release_rule: Critical; do not release from photo alone.

measurement_method: Trace relief on card/acetate and measure corners
release_rule: Use physical trace for final cut.

measurement_method: Prove the left strip/liner exists on a physical front-support carrier or installed location before quoting production
release_rule: Current loose-part photos are mixed with bump-stop fragments.

measurement_method: If proven required, trace old rubber/metal carrier on card/acetate and measure section thickness
release_rule: Photo dimension is quote-only.

measurement_method: Prove the right strip/liner exists on a physical front-support carrier or installed location before quoting production
release_rule: Current loose-part photos are mixed with bump-stop fragments.

measurement_method: Place left/right samples on vehicle or carrier only after existence is proven
release_rule: Do not assume symmetry if old carrier proves handed.

measurement_method: Find the suspected longer full-width flat pieces or the installed location; photograph full length with tape and measure length/width/thickness/holes/function
release_rule: Do not quote until quantity, location, and function are proven.
